title: INTERNAL Error: Attempted to dereference unique_ptr that is NULL
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c0 INT PRIMARY KEY, c1 FLOAT, c2 TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE t3(c0 VARCHAR(255), c1 TIMESTAMP, c2 FLOAT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0);
SELECT * FROM t2 LEFT JOIN t3 ON(t2.c2 = t3.c1) WHERE t3.c0 IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Dereferencing NULL unique_ptr during RIGHT JOIN operation
